commands.data: UPDATE TransX SET BusCat = '' WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]' AND BusCat = 'XX';

commands.description: Clear buscat where value is 'xx' (FROM syntax)
commands.data: UPDATE TransX SET BusCat = '' FROM TransX WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]' AND BusCat = 'XX';

commands.description: Delete all transx rows for batch
Delete rows where any of amt1/2/3 is zero
commands.data: DELETE TransX WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]' AND (Amt1 = 0 OR Amt2 = 0 OR Amt3 = 0);

commands.description: Delete rows where flex1 is null
commands.data: DELETE TransX WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]' AND Flex1 IS NULL;

commands.description: Delete rows where pk is null
commands.data: DELETE TransX WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]' AND PK IS NULL;

commands.description: Delete rows where amt1 is zero
commands.data: DELETE TransX WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]' AND Amt1 = 0;

commands.description: Delete rows where amt1 and amt2 are zero
commands.data: DELETE TransX WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]' AND Amt1 = 0 AND Amt2 = 0;

commands.description: Delete rows where amt1, amt2, amt3 zero
commands.data: DELETE TransX WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]' AND Amt1 = 0 AND Amt2 = 0 AND Amt3 = 0;

commands.description: Delete rows where amt1-amt4 all zero
commands.data: DELETE TransX WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]' AND Amt1 = 0 AND Amt2 = 0 AND Amt3 = 0 AND Amt4 = 0;

commands.description: Delete rows where amt2 is zero
commands.data: DELETE TransX WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]' AND amt2 = 0;
UPDATE TransX SET BusCat = '30' WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]' AND BusCat LIKE '3%';
UPDATE TransX SET GLdesc = c.Descr FROM TransX AS t INNER JOIN COA AS c ON t.GL = c.GL WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]';

commands.description: Set gldesc from COA (alias, prefix match)
commands.data: UPDATE x SET x.GLdesc = y.Descr FROM TransX AS x INNER JOIN COA AS y ON x.GL = y.GL WHERE KeyID LIKE '[batchID]%';

commands.description: Set gldesc from COA (batch prefix match)
commands.data: UPDATE TransX SET GLdesc = c.Descr FROM TransX AS t INNER JOIN COA AS c ON t.GL = c.GL WHERE KeyID LIKE '[batchID]%';
UPDATE TransX SET TPname = p.Name FROM TransX AS t INNER JOIN TPs AS p ON t.TP = p.TP WHERE KeyID = '[batchID]';
